commands.cmd: read-only audit of migration 0019, schema, intake domain/service, authorization and focused/full evidence

summary: Approved T024: append-only latest-revision checks, cross-profile isolation, fixed private permissions, frozen recipe/product/source/calculation/portion evidence, and explicit allocation-to-intake linking preserve privacy and history while keeping planned/Pantry/cooked state out of consumption. The next required boundary is signed-session resolution and trusted-origin authenticated APIs.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit without returning, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
